upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vi vfScad vajreRa vftramindraH' (f0 16110) vivfScat vyavfScat=viviDamacCinat SakalAnyakarot
'adanti tvA pipIlikA vi vfScanti mayUryaH' (aTarva0 7567) vivfScanti caYcuBiH pratudanti vitudanti vidArayanti
'etAByastvA devatABya AvfScAmaH' (Sa0 brA0 121222) avfScAmaH pfTak kurmaH
'A vfScyantAmaditaye durevAH' (f0 108718) pustake'rTo na niradeSItyarTanirdeSAyehAnUdyate AvfScyantAmAcCidyantAm durevA yAtuDAnAH
'A devatAByo vfScyate pApIyAnBavati' (tE0 brA0 1148) AvfScyate vicCidyate viSlizyate pfTagBavati
'pavyeva rAjannaGaSaMsamajara nIcA ni vfSca' (f0 685) nivfSca CinDi CitvA nipAtaya
